title: Is Regions Financial (RF) Stock Undervalued Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: Regions Financial (RF) Up 18% QTD: Is Further Upside Left?
text: Regions Financial (RF) stock rallies 18% quarter to date. Solid organic growth, acquisitions and robust balance sheet position will keep supporting price performance.

title: S&P 500 Banks Make a Resounding Come Back QTD: 3 Solid Picks
text: After witnessing a challenging start to the year, banks are rebounding since July. Thus, Regions Financial (RF), M&T Bank (MTB) and Comerica (CMA) are worth betting on as these outperform the S&P 500 Index and have solid near-term prospects.

title: Regions Financial: Shares Surge Following Strong Economic Data
text: Regional banks are in rally-mode after a slew of solid macro data. Regions Financial sports impressive relative strength vs. its industry ETF.
